name: Stephen Curry
title: NBA Point Guard
bio: American professional basketball player for the Golden State Warriors. Four-time NBA champion, two-time NBA MVP, and widely regarded as the greatest shooter in NBA history.
faith: Curry has repeatedly professed his faith in Jesus Christ in MVP acceptance speeches and interviews. He wears Philippians 4:13 on his shoes. In his 2015 MVP speech he said, 'First and foremost I have to thank my Lord and Savior Jesus Christ for blessing me with the talents to play this game.'
